policy: You can return most items within 14 days of delivery with no reason needed, as long as the product is in the same condition as at the time of sale and you have the original sales invoice in your name. If a product is defective or does not match its listed specifications, the return window is 30 days. Refunds are issued using the same payment method you used. Some items cannot be returned, such as goods whose packaging makes resale impossible or fast-deteriorating/consumable items. For help with a return, call 19857 or email sales@myxprs.com.

XPRS delivers across Egypt, usually within about 48 hours of placing your order. Cash on delivery is available nationwide. Delivery fees can vary by area and order, so the exact fee is shown at checkout — for help call 19857.
All products sold by XPRS are 100% original and come with the official manufacturer warranty. XPRS also provides maintenance and warranty support through its own service centers.

We accept credit cards (including Visa and Apple Pay) and cash on delivery across Egypt. You can also pay in monthly installments with 0% interest, 0% fees and 0% down payment through our partners: CIB, NBE, Banque Misr, Valu, Souhoola, TRU, Seven, and Forsa.

Buy now and pay monthly with 0% interest, 0% fees and 0% down payment through our partner banks and providers: CIB, NBE, Banque Misr, Valu, Souhoola, TRU, Seven, and Forsa. Installment plans and durations can vary by product and provider.
